name: add_comm
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators
open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  induction a with
  | zero =>
    simp
  | succ a ih =>
    rw [Nat.add_succ, Nat.succ_add]
    rw [ih]
```

name: add_assoc
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators
open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem add_assoc (a b c : ℕ) : (a + b) + c = a + (b + c) := by
  induction c with
  | zero =>
    simp
  | succ c ih =>
    simp [add_succ, succ_add]
    rw [ih]
```

name: list_reverse_reverse
output:

```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open List
theorem reverse_twice (xs : List α) : xs.reverse.reverse = xs := by
  induction xs with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons x xs ih =>
    simp [reverse_cons, ih]
  <;> aesop
```

```lean4
open Rat
theorem List_map_append {α β : Type} (f : α → β) (xs ys : List α) :
  (xs ++ ys).map f = xs.map f ++ ys.map f := by
  induction xs with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons x xs ih =>
    simp [List.map_cons, ih]
```

name: list_filter_def
output:
```lean4
def filter (p : α → Bool) (xs : List α) : List α :=
  match xs with
  | [] => []
  | x :: xs' => if p x then x :: filter p xs' else filter p xs'
```

name: or_comm
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators
open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem disjunction_commutative (P Q : Prop) : P ∨ Q ↔ Q ∨ P := by
  constructor
  · intro h
    cases h with
    | inl hp => exact Or.inr hp
    | inr hq => exact Or.inl hq
  · intro h
    cases h with
    | inl hq => exact Or.inr hq
    | inr hp => exact Or.inl hp
```

name: demorgan_or
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators
open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem de_morgan_law (P Q : Prop) : ¬(P ∨ Q) ↔ ¬P ∧ ¬Q := by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    constructor
    · intro hP
      apply h
      left
      exact hP
    · intro hQ
      apply h
      right
      exact hQ
  · intro h
    intro h1
    cases h1 with
    | inl h1 => apply h.1 h1
    | inr h1 => apply h.2 h1
```

name: comp_injective
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators
open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem comp_injective {X Y Z : Type*} (f : X → Y) (g : Y → Z)
  (hf : Function.Injective f) (hg : Function.Injective g) :
  Function.Injective (g ∘ f) := by
  intro x₁ x₂ h
  have h1 : f x₁ = f x₂ := by
    apply hg
    exact h
  exact hf h1
```

name: deriv_x_squared
output:
```lean
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators Real Nat Topology Rat
open Filter Topology
open scoped BigOperators
theorem basic_deriv {f : ℝ → ℝ} {g : ℝ → Set ℝ} {x : ℝ}
    (hf : f = fun x => x^2) (hg : g = fun x => {x})
    (h : ∀ x, IsDerivWithinAt f (g x) (f x) x) :
    ∀ x, deriv f x = 2 * x := by
  intro x
  have h1 : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x => x^2) x := by
    apply differentiableAt_pow
  have h2 : deriv (fun x => x^2) x = 2 * x := by
    simp [deriv_pow]
  rw [show f = fun x => x^2 by exact_mod_cast hf] at *
  exact h2
```
